_comment: MCP server config consumed by every role's `claude --mcp-config` invocation. Used by run_claude in agents/role-base.sh. Edit the URLs/env if your local setup differs.

cocos-creator._notes: Provided by https://github.com/dyCuong03/cocos-mcp-server installed as a Cocos Creator extension. Start via Extension → Cocos MCP Server → Start in the Cocos Creator editor. Default port 3000; change here and in the editor panel together if you remap.

agentmemory._notes: Cross-session memory for the team. Used by every role to recall prior decisions and save compact summaries instead of re-reading large docs. Adjust command/args to match your local agentmemory MCP install.
